age_limit.age_details: Retired teachers may also be considered for appointment as Guest Faculty subject to a maximum age limit of 70 years.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 70 years (for retired teachers) Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Qualifications for guest faculty shall be the same as those prescribed for appointment of regular Assistant Professor of Universities/College in UGC regulations.
qualification.details: Assistant Professor, Computer Science: Qualifications for guest faculty shall be the same as those prescribed for appointment of regular Assistant Professor of Universities/College in UGC regulations. Assistant Professor, Instrumentation: Qualifications for guest faculty shall be the same as those prescribed for appointment of regular Assistant Professor of Universities/College in UGC regulations. Assistant Professor, Microbiology: Qualifications for guest faculty shall be the same as those prescribed for appointment of regular Assistant Professor of Universities/College in UGC regulations. Assistant Professor, Physics: Qualifications for guest faculty shall be the same as those prescribed for appointment of regular Assistant Professor of Universities/College in UGC regulations. Assistant Professor, Statistics: Qualifications for guest faculty shall be the same as those prescribed for appointment of regular Assistant Professor of Universities/College in UGC regulations.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1500/- per lecture, maximum Rs. 50,000/- per month
salary_details.details: Honorarium @ Rs. 1500/- per lecture, maximum Rs. 50,000/- per month.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SRCASW Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Assistant Professor on Guest Lecture basis position is 30th March 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The honorarium is Rs. 1500/- per lecture, with a maximum monthly earning of Rs. 50,000/-.

faq.question: Q3. What are the eligibility criteria for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: The qualifications required are the same as those prescribed for regular Assistant Professors in UGC regulations.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Assistant Professor on Guest Lecture basis positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the respective department.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age limit for applying?
faq.answer: Retired teachers can be considered up to a maximum age of 70 years.

faq.question: Q7. Which departments are recruiting Assistant Professors?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Computer Science, Instrumentation, Microbiology, Physics, and Statistics departments.

faq.question: Q8. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type is contract-based for the Assistant Professor on Guest Lecture basis role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page.
